newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.headline: Stay curious. We deliver the spark.
newsletter.subline: Once a month: the best new courses, learning hacks and exclusive discounts. No spam – promised.
newsletter.success: Almost there! We sent you a confirmation link – one click and you're in.
newsletter.hint: Double opt-in: you'll get a confirmation email first. Unsubscribe anytime with one click. Our <privacy>privacy policy</privacy> applies.
newsletter.confirmedText: Your subscription is confirmed. We'll be in touch when there's something truly good.
newsletter.unsubscribedText: Sad to see you go! You won't receive further newsletters. Come back anytime.
newsletter.linkInvalidText: This link has expired or was already used.

profile.title: Profile
profile.avatarHint: JPG, PNG or WebP, max. 2 MB
profile.creatorBioHint: Introduce yourself to your learners – shown on your course pages and your storefront.
profile.billingHint: For your course purchases as a learner. Payouts as a creator are managed in the studio under Distribution.
profile.modeText: One account, two worlds: in the learning area you take courses – in the Creator Studio you build and sell your own. Switch anytime with one click.
profile.creatorCardText: Create courses, build exams, manage coupons.

footer.tagline: The platform for courses that stick.

consent.title: Cookies at LearnSphere
consent.description: We use necessary cookies to run the platform – and, with your consent, anonymised statistics to make LearnSphere better. Details in our
consent.settingsIntro: Choose which categories to allow. You can change your selection anytime via the footer.
consent.necessaryDesc: Required for sign-in, cart and security. Cannot be disabled.
consent.analyticsDesc: Anonymised usage statistics (Google Analytics) – helps us understand which content works. No advertising cookies.

roadmap.title: What's coming next
roadmap.lead: What we're building right now and what follows – no marketing fog. Order and timing may shift, the direction won't.
roadmap.r1Text: The creator API will also serve course content for enrolled users and a full checkout – your shop, fully headless on your own site.
roadmap.r2Text: Ask questions about the course, get per-section summaries and exam prep – an AI that actually knows the course.
roadmap.r3Text: iOS and Android apps with downloads for learning on the go – progress syncs as soon as you're back online.
roadmap.r4Text: Creators host live sessions right inside the course – with recordings that automatically become lessons afterwards.
roadmap.r5Text: Buy courses for whole teams, track learning progress centrally, company invoicing – corporate training without detours.
roadmap.r6Text: Discussions and questions attached to every lesson – learners help learners, creators answer right where the question arises.
roadmap.r7Text: Videos get automatic subtitles and translations – courses become more accessible and reach an international audience.
roadmap.r8Text: Every certificate gets a public verification page: employers verify credentials with one click – tamper-proof and linkable.
roadmap.disclaimer: Missing something? Tell us – this roadmap runs on your feedback.

affiliateProgram.title: Recommend courses. Earn 15%.
affiliateProgram.lead: Share your affiliate link – if someone buys any course within 7 days, you get 15% of the purchase price credited to your balance.
affiliateProgram.step1Text: Use your existing account or register – one click, accept the terms, done.
affiliateProgram.step2Text: Your personal link sets a 7-day cookie. The last click wins – and every course purchase in that window counts.
affiliateProgram.step3Text: The commission lands as credit on your account: withdrawable from €10 or usable directly for your own course purchases.
affiliateProgram.term1: Commission applies to purchases within 7 days after the click (last click wins).
affiliateProgram.term2: No commission on your own purchases or on courses you created yourself.
affiliateProgram.term3: Free courses earn nothing; the basis is the price actually paid (after coupons).
affiliateProgram.term4: Commissions are released 30 days after purchase (buyers' refund window); credit is withdrawable from €10 and can be used for course purchases.
affiliateProgram.term5: Abuse (e.g. cookie spam, misleading advertising) leads to exclusion from the program.
affiliateProgram.acceptTerms: I accept the terms of the affiliate program.
affiliateProgram.joinLoginFirst: Log in or register to become a partner:
affiliateProgram.apiHint: Want to embed courses on your site via API? The affiliate API returns the full catalog with your commission links – details in the
affiliateProgram.leaveConfirmMessage: Your links and the affiliate API will immediately stop earning commission. Commissions you already earned are kept. You can rejoin anytime – your link becomes active again.

home.heroSubtitle: Courses by independent creators – with video, audio and exercises, real exams and certificates for your LinkedIn profile.
home.how1Text: Browse the catalog and watch free preview lessons – no subscription, you only buy what you want to learn.
home.how2Text: Video, audio, text and exercises. Your progress is saved automatically – you continue exactly where you left off.
home.how3Text: Pass the final exam and download your certificate as a PDF – in German or English, ready for LinkedIn.
home.creatorText: Create courses with exams and certificates and earn up to 75% on every sale – no monthly costs. Sell via LearnSphere, a widget on your website, the API or your own domain.

landing.heroSubtitle: Create courses people actually finish. With sections, exams and certificates – all in one place.
landing.featuresTitle: From the first video to the certificate
landing.feature1Text: Sections, videos, files and text – woven into a coherent journey.
landing.feature2Text: Define how much must be watched before the final exam unlocks.
landing.feature3Text: Section quizzes, a final exam with a pass mark and a PDF certificate ready for LinkedIn.
landing.feature4Text: Offer courses for free or sell them – you decide per course.
landing.how1Text: Register, pick a plan, get going. Free forever for learners.
landing.how2Text: Upload content, order sections, define exams.
landing.how3Text: Whoever passes gets a beautiful PDF – multilingual and LinkedIn-ready.
landing.ctaBandText: Start for free – no credit card circus, no lock-in.

pricing.faq1Q: Do learners pay anything to LearnSphere?
pricing.faq1A: Learners don't need a subscription – they buy courses individually at the price you set. Free courses stay free.
pricing.faq2A: Via Stripe Connect directly to your own Stripe account – instantly with every sale. Your share: 50% for sales via LearnSphere, 75% via your own channels (widget/API).
pricing.faq3Q: What is the API subscription for?
pricing.faq3A: The Starter plan is free forever. You only need the API subscription if you want to integrate your courses into your own website with full design freedom – cancel anytime.

auth.resetSuccess: Password changed! You can sign in now.

settings.title: Settings
settings.twoFactorIntro: Protect your account with an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, Authy or 1Password).
settings.scanQr: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
settings.twoFactorEnabled: 2FA is now active. You'll need your code at next sign-in.
settings.recoverySaveHint: Store these codes somewhere safe (password manager or printout). Each code replaces your 2FA code once if you lose your device. They are shown only NOW.
settings.termineIntro: Connect your termine.lol account so learners can book appointments with you in your courses. You choose per course whether appointments are offered.
settings.termineDisconnected: The termine.lol connection has been disconnected.
settings.exportIntro: Download all data stored for your account as JSON (Art. 20 GDPR) – profile, purchases, learning progress, notes, comments, reviews.
settings.deleteIntro: Permanently deletes your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteWarning: If you delete your account, the following happens – permanently and without recovery:
settings.deleteConsequenceCourses: All courses you created will be deleted.
settings.anonymizeConsequenceCourses: Your courses will be withdrawn from sale – already enrolled learners keep their access (they paid for it).
settings.anonymizeConsequenceName: Your name and all personal data will be removed; "Deleted creator" appears as the author everywhere.
settings.deleteConsequenceEnrollments: Your course purchases, enrollments and all learning progress will be lost.
settings.deleteConsequenceCertificates: Your certificates will be deleted and can no longer be verified (e.g. on LinkedIn).
settings.deleteConsequenceEarnings: Unpaid earnings and credit are forfeited; an active API subscription will be cancelled.
settings.deleteConsequenceRetention: We retain invoice and payout records for the statutory period (10 years), strictly for accounting purposes – they are no longer displayed anywhere.
settings.deleteConsequenceIrreversible: There is no way to restore anything – not even via support.
settings.deleteConfirmLabel: To confirm, type your email address: {email}
settings.deleteConfirmMismatch: Your input does not match your email address.

dashboard.title: Creator Studio
dashboard.noCourses: No courses yet. Create your first!
dashboard.noResults: No courses found – adjust search or filters.
dashboard.coverPlaceholder: No image yet – shown on course cards and the course page.
dashboard.coverHint: JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF, max. 5 MB. Optional – without an image, catalog cards show a placeholder.
dashboard.cropHint: Drag the selection to move it, drag the corner to scale – arrow keys move, Shift+arrows resize. Export is {width} × {height} pixels.
dashboard.cropBoxLabel: Image crop – move with arrow keys, resize with Shift+arrows
dashboard.cropTooSmall: too small, at least {width} × {height} px required – enlarge the selection
dashboard.cropSourceTooSmall: the image itself is smaller than {width} × {height} px – please upload a larger image
dashboard.tagsHint: Enter or comma adds a tag, max. 10 – makes your course findable via search.
dashboard.priceBelowMinimum: Paid courses cost at least €4.99 – or set the course to “Free”.
dashboard.requiredWatchPercent: Required watch share for exam admission (%)
dashboard.renameSectionHint: Double-click or press Enter to rename
dashboard.videoUrl: Video URL (YouTube link, mp4 or upload)
dashboard.uploadFailed: Upload failed – file too large or type not allowed.
dashboard.moderationFlagged: Publishing not possible: at least one video/image was flagged by the content check and awaits manual review.
dashboard.moderationPending: The automatic content check is still running – please try again in a few minutes.
dashboard.courseFlaggedByAdmin: This course has been locked by the LearnSphere team and cannot be published.
dashboard.segmentsHint: Wrong assignment? Click the correct speaker on the segment.
dashboard.posterEmpty: No preview image – uploading a video sets the first frame automatically.

uploadHints.image: JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF – max. 5 MB

lessonErrors.lesson_needs_block: The lesson needs at least one content block.
lessonErrors.url_required: Please enter a URL or upload a file.

dashboard.attemptPolicyHint: Example: 3 attempts and 24 hours = at most 3 attempts per 24 hours. Without a window, attempts are used up for good.
dashboard.questionPointsHint: Weight in grading – the score is earned points out of possible points.
dashboard.quizErrTitle: Please give the exam a title (at least 3 characters).
dashboard.quizErrQuestionText: Question {n} still needs its question text.
dashboard.quizErrExpectedAnswer: Question {n} is a free-text question – please add a model answer.
dashboard.quizErrTwoOptions: Question {n} needs at least two answer options.
dashboard.quizErrOptionText: Question {n} has empty answer options – fill them in or remove them.
dashboard.quizErrCorrectOption: Question {n}: mark at least one answer as correct.
dashboard.quizErrNeedsQuestion: The exam needs at least one question.
dashboard.quizErrGeneric: Saving failed – please check your input and try again.
dashboard.chaptersHint: Chapters appear as markers in the video timeline. Times as m:ss – rows without a title are not saved.
dashboard.chaptersReplaceConfirm: Replace existing chapters with the AI suggestion?
dashboard.chaptersTranscriptShort: The transcript is too short for meaningful chapters.
dashboard.chaptersNeedTranscript: Create a transcript first – suggestions are generated from it.
dashboard.selfTestsEnabled: Offer AI self-tests (“Test yourself”) in lessons
dashboard.selfTestManageIntro: These questions were generated by AI from the lesson content. Delete individual ones or regenerate all – learners always see the current set.
dashboard.selfTestNoQuestions: No questions generated yet – this happens automatically when learners open the self-test for the first time.
dashboard.copilotIntro: Suggestions based on your course content (texts and transcripts). Nothing is applied unless you apply it – saved as usual via Save.
dashboard.copilotLoading: Copilot is reading your course content …
dashboard.copilotNotEnough: Not enough course content yet – add lessons with text or transcripts.
dashboard.copilotRateLimited: Lots of requests right now – please try again in a few minutes.
dashboard.provenanceLabel: Content origin (shown to learners as a footnote)
dashboard.noCoupons: No coupons for this course yet.
dashboard.couponsOnlyPaid: Coupons are only available for paid courses.

couponErrors.code_too_short: The code needs at least 3 characters.
couponErrors.percent_above_100: More than 100% discount is not possible.
couponErrors.value_above_price: The final price must be below the cheapest selected course.
couponErrors.value_too_small: The value must be greater than 0.
couponErrors.course_free: Coupons only work for paid courses.

dashboard.livePreviewHint: This is how learners see your course page – updates as you type.
dashboard.aiGradedHint: Off = the answer must match the model solution exactly (case-insensitive).
dashboard.shuffleAnswers: Show answer options in random order
dashboard.transcribeOnlyUploads: Automatic transcription works for uploaded files only – for YouTube etc. paste the transcript manually.
dashboard.transcriptWait: Transcription is running – saving will be possible in a moment.
dashboard.transcriptPlaceholder: Paste the transcript here or generate it automatically …

transcriptErrors.url_not_upload: Automatic transcription only works for your own uploaded files.
transcriptErrors.file_too_large: The file is too long for transcription (max. approx. 4 hours).
transcriptErrors.video_needs_ffmpeg: Videos over 25 MB need ffmpeg on the server (extracts the audio automatically) – or upload the audio track as an audio file.

dashboard.deleteQuestionMessage: The question and its answer options will be removed from the quiz.
dashboard.deleteOptionMessage: This answer option will be removed from the question.
dashboard.courseLanguagesHint: Enable additional languages to translate titles, content and media. Missing translations automatically show the base language.
dashboard.translationFallbackNote: Empty fields automatically show the content of the base language ({base}).
dashboard.translationHint: You are editing the {lang} version. Empty fields automatically fall back to {base} – manage block structure and order in the {base} tab.
dashboard.translationMediaFallback: No translated media file – learners see the original ({base}) with a notice.
dashboard.translationTextFallback: Leave empty = content of the base language ({base}) is shown.
dashboard.listedInShopFreeHint: Free courses are always visible in the LearnSphere shop and cannot be hidden. Switch the course to "Paid" if you want to remove it from the shop.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Really delete? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteBlocked: Deletion not possible: {count, plural, one {# person has} other {# people have}} enrolled in this course. Set it to draft instead – participants keep their access.
dashboard.dripDaysLabel: Unlock no earlier than X days after purchase
dashboard.dripDaysHint: 0 or empty = available immediately. Both rules are optional and combinable.
dashboard.dripQuizLabel: Unlock only after the previous section's quiz is passed
dashboard.waitlistHint: While the course is unpublished, the course page shows a “coming soon” page with email signup. On publishing, everyone on the list is notified once.

creatorPricing.title: Pricing for creators
creatorPricing.subtitle: Start for free and sell right away. Pay only if you want the pro integration on your own site.
creatorPricing.freeDesc: Everything you need to create and sell.
creatorPricing.apiDesc: Your courses on your own site – with full design freedom.
creatorPricing.apiF2: Full design freedom on your website
creatorPricing.apiF3: 75% share on sales via your channels
creatorPricing.apiF4: Up to 5 API keys + everything in Starter
creatorPricing.note: Revenue share in all plans: 50% for sales via LearnSphere, 75% via your own channels.

distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.intro: Sell your courses where your audience is: in the LearnSphere shop, as a widget on your website, via the API – or under your own domain.
distribution.storefrontIntro: Your public course page. It is also the basis for your whitelabel domain.
distribution.customDomainHint: Create a CNAME record pointing to your LearnSphere instance – visitors of your domain will land directly on your storefront.
distribution.notSetUp: Set up handle and name first.
distribution.apiIntro: Pull your published courses as JSON into your own website or app. Authentication via bearer token.
distribution.apiLocked: API access is part of the API plan: €25/month or €20/month with yearly billing – with full design freedom on your site.
distribution.apiActivated: API access activated – create your first key now!
distribution.keyCreatedHint: Copy it now – for security it is shown only this once.
distribution.payoutsIntro: Connect your own Stripe account: course revenue goes directly to you. Your share: 50% for sales via LearnSphere, 75% via your own channels (widget/API).
distribution.connectActive: Connected – payments go directly to your account
distribution.connectNone: Not connected yet – payments run via the platform
distribution.connectDone: Stripe account connected! Click "Refresh status" once Stripe has confirmed your onboarding.
distribution.connectStripeDisabled: Stripe is not configured yet (keys missing in the environment variables).
distribution.payoutBankIntro: For sales collected by LearnSphere on your behalf. Sales via your Stripe Connect account are paid out by Stripe directly and don't appear here.

payoutErrors.holder_required: Please enter the account holder's name.
payoutErrors.iban_invalid: This IBAN is invalid – please check your input.
payoutErrors.below_minimum: Payouts are only possible from a €10 balance.
payoutErrors.request_pending: A payout request is already pending.

distribution.embedIntro: Copy the iframe code into your website. The widget shows the course card with price and links to your course.
distribution.shopNote: Whether a course is also listed in the LearnSphere shop is set in the course editor ("Show in the LearnSphere shop").

errors.domain_taken: This domain is already in use.

errors.api_plan_required: This requires the API plan (€25/month or €20/month yearly).

catalog.title: Explore courses
catalog.subtitle: By creators who know their craft.
catalog.noResults: No courses found – try a different search term.

course.paymentsUnavailable: Payments are currently unavailable. Please try again later.
course.creatorAvgRating: Avg. across all courses · {count, plural, one {# rating} other {# ratings}}
course.aiNoticeText: Parts of this course's content may have been created or revised with the help of artificial intelligence – in particular transcripts and captions, translations, automatically generated practice questions, and the evaluation of free-text answers in exams. Editorial responsibility remains with the respective creator; AI-assisted content may contain errors despite review. This disclosure is made in line with the transparency obligations of the EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Art. 50).
course.purchaseNote: Demo checkout: the purchase is simulated without a payment provider.

couponErrors.coupon_inactive: This coupon is no longer active.
couponErrors.coupon_not_started: This coupon is not valid yet.
couponErrors.coupon_exhausted: This coupon has already been redeemed too often.

refund.modalText: You'll receive a full refund. Your access, learning progress and any certificate for this course will be revoked immediately and permanently.
refund.reasonPlaceholder: Your feedback helps us and the creator improve the courses …
refund.reasonOptional: Optional – returns work without giving any reason.
refund.errorExpired: The 30-day return window has already expired or been ended.
refund.errorStore: You purchased this via the App Store or Google Play – please request the refund directly there.
refund.errorGeneric: The return didn't work. Please try again or contact support.

provenance.HUMAN: This content was created by humans.
provenance.HUMAN_AI_ASSISTED: This content was created by humans, with AI assistance.
provenance.AI_EDITED: This content was AI-generated and adapted by humans.
provenance.AI_REVIEWED: This content was AI-generated and reviewed by humans.

learn.examRequirement: You need at least {percent}% watched and all section quizzes passed.
learn.videoNotSupported: Your browser cannot play this video.

learn.selfTestNotEnough: This lesson doesn't have enough content for meaningful questions yet.

learn.ytConsentPrivacy: Learn more in our privacy policy

learn.focusHint: Hide everything except the lesson (Esc exits)
learn.journeyHint: Each station is a section – click to jump there.

exam.title: Exam: {title}
exam.question: Question {current} of {total}
exam.certificateHint: Also available in German – and ready for LinkedIn.
exam.notEligible: You are not yet admitted to the exam.
exam.notEligiblePage: You're not yet admitted to the final exam: watch at least {percent}% of the course content and pass all section quizzes – then you can start right here.
exam.leaveWarningText: You left the exam window ({count} of {max}). On leave number {max}, your exam will be submitted automatically with your current answers.
exam.guaranteeBlocked: The final exam is locked during your 30-day money-back guarantee – it opens automatically on {date}.
exam.guaranteeBlockedShort: The final exam is locked while the money-back guarantee is active.
exam.guaranteeExplain: While the guarantee is active you can return the course at any time – that's why no certificate can be issued during this period. If you want to take the exam right away, you can voluntarily end your money-back guarantee.
exam.guaranteeWaive: End guarantee and unlock the exam
exam.guaranteeWaiveWarning: Are you sure? Once you end the guarantee, you can NO longer return this course. This cannot be undone.
exam.guaranteeWaiveConfirm: Yes, end the guarantee for good
exam.guaranteeExamNote: The final exam opens after your money-back guarantee on {date} – or end it voluntarily on the exam page.
exam.timeExpired: Time is up – this attempt was not counted. Reload the page to start fresh (if attempts remain).
exam.blockedAlreadyPassed: You have already passed this exam – retakes are not allowed.
exam.blockedExhausted: You have used up all attempts for this exam.
exam.blockedCooldown: Attempt limit reached. Next attempt possible: {date}
exam.signalRemaining: {left, plural, one {# switch} other {# switches}} left until automatic submission

assistant.title: Learning assistant
assistant.welcome: Hi! I know all the contents of this course and I'm here to help you learn. Ask me about the current lesson – or start with a suggestion.
assistant.newChatMessage: Your previous conversation with the learning assistant in this course will be removed and can no longer be accessed.
assistant.errorRateLimited: Take a breath – you sent a lot of messages just now. Try again in a moment.
assistant.errorGeneric: That didn't work. Please try again.

verify.title: Verify certificate
verify.intro: Enter the certificate number (printed on every LearnSphere certificate) to verify its authenticity – no account needed.
verify.validText: This certificate was issued by LearnSphere. The details below come directly from our system – not from the PDF.
verify.invalidText: No certificate is registered under this number. Check the spelling (e.g. LS-K3F9-KX2M-8PQZ) – or the certificate presented is not genuine.
verify.creator: Course by
verify.curriculumFrozen: As of completion ({date}) – later changes to the course are not included here.
verify.curriculumCurrent: Current course contents – the course may have changed since completion.
verify.noCurriculum: No contents are registered for this course.
verify.noSectionExams: This course has no section exams.
verify.hint: This page is public – clicking the certificate number in the PDF leads directly here.

certDesigner.title: Certificate designer
certDesigner.intro: Design the certificate for your course: typography, frame, format, logo and signature. Learners can download it in light or dark; name, course, serial number and issue date are always included – keeping every certificate verifiable.
certDesigner.logoHint: Shown below the LearnSphere wordmark. PNG or JPG, max. 5 MB.
certDesigner.previewHint: Live preview with sample data – learners can download both variants (light and dark).

errors.content_flagged: The content was rejected by content moderation.
errors.upload_failed: Logo upload failed. Please try again.
errors.logo_format: Please use PNG or JPG – the PDF cannot embed other formats.

reset.subject: Reset your password – LearnSphere
reset.body:
Hi!

You (or someone else) requested a password reset. Click the link below to choose a new password. The link is valid for 60 minutes.

{url}

If this wasn't you, you can safely ignore this email.

Your LearnSphere team

verify.subject: Please confirm your email address – LearnSphere
verify.body:
Welcome to LearnSphere!

Please confirm your email address via the link below to activate your account. The link is valid for 24 hours.

{url}

If you didn't sign up, you can safely ignore this email – the account will remain inactive.

Your LearnSphere team

stats.title: Statistics
stats.heatmapHint: Which parts of your videos are watched – and where do learners drop off? High curve = watched often. Data is anonymous and grows with every playback.
stats.heatmapViews: {count, plural, one {# data point} other {# data points}}
stats.skylineHint: Drag to rotate · point for details
stats.noData: No data in this period yet.

rating.title: Rate this course
rating.reviewPlaceholder: Care to share how you liked the course? (optional)
rating.reviewTooLong: The review is too long (max. 2000 characters).

notFound.title: This page has drifted out of orbit.
notFound.text: The link no longer exists – or never did.

review.title: Review
review.noExpectedAnswer: No model answer is stored for this question.
review.wrongHint: No worries – this card will come back later in this round.
review.gradeDaysHint: in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
review.emptyTitle: Nothing due – it is all in your head!
review.emptyNoCards: As soon as you attempt your first section or final exam, flashcards are created automatically from the exam questions.
review.emptyNextDue: Your next review is due on {date}.
review.emptyAllDone: No cards are due right now. Check back later.
review.doneText: Your brain thanks you – spaced review anchors knowledge for the long run.
review.moreDue: {count, plural, one {# more card} other {# more cards}} due – keep going after this round.
review.dueBadge: {count, plural, one {# card} other {# cards}} due

waitlist.teaser: This course is almost ready. Sign up and we will let you know the moment it launches – no spam, just a single email.
waitlist.success: You are on the waitlist! We will notify you as soon as the course is available.
waitlist.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts – please try again later.
waitlist.errorGeneric: That did not work. Please try again.
waitlist.privacy: Your address is used for this one notification only.

courseStats.title: Course analytics
courseStats.funnelHint: Share of learners who completed each lesson – a steep drop between two lessons shows where learners quit.
courseStats.retentionHint: How much of your videos actually gets watched. The dashed line marks the biggest drop-off point.
courseStats.dropAt: Biggest drop at about {percent} % of the runtime (−{lost} points)
courseStats.noMedia: This course has no video or audio blocks.

greeting.subline: Small steps, every day – that is the whole trick.
greeting.streakAria: Learning streak: {days} days in a row
greeting.weekLabel: {days, plural, one {# active day} other {# active days}} this week
greeting.dueCards: {count, plural, one {# flashcard is} other {# flashcards are}} due for review.
greeting.noDueCards: No flashcards due – it all sticks. 💪

a11yFeedback.name: Name
a11yFeedback.subject: Subject
a11yFeedback.messagePlaceholder: What got in your way? Where did it happen? What do you use to browse (e.g. screen reader, keyboard)?
a11yFeedback.success: Thank you! We received your report and will get back to you.
a11yFeedback.privacyNote: We use your details solely to reply to your report.

errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many reports in a short time. Please try again later.
errors.generic: That did not work. Please email us directly at accessibility@learnsphere.one.

assistantCoverage.title: of your course videos are known to the assistant
assistantCoverage.complete: Every video and audio block has a transcript. The assistant knows the whole course.
assistantCoverage.incomplete: {blocks} media blocks ({duration}) have no transcript. They are silent to the assistant – it only sees the lesson title. Generate a transcript in the block itself.
